subject: Re: FW: Queries
body:
i didn't see the condo info..... no to dubai.....  do
you really think that the space can be used

--- Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com> wrote:

>  
> 
>   _____  
> 
> From: Farkas, Andrew [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
> Sent: Thursday, January 05, 2006 12:54 PM
> To: lesley@nysgllc.com
> Subject: Queries
> 
> 
> 
> 1)       Are you going to come to Dubai for any of
> the time between 1/16 and
> 1/20?  If you do NOT go (i.e. if I do not fly with
> you) I will leave Sunday
> night, 1/15 and return on the flight leaving Dubai
> at 1:30am on 1/20.  The
> flight to Dubai arrives at 8:30pm on 1/16 and the
> return flight lands at JFK
> at 6:30am on 1/20.  Sultan would like to know so
> that appropriate
> arrangements may be made.
> 
> 2)       Any thoughts about the St. Thomas condo at
> Yacht Haven?
> 
> 3)       Do you want me to get a space planner
> involved in trying to come up
> w/ some concepts for a renovation and
> reconfiguration of the space on top of
> 230 Park Avenue for use as your office?  My guess is
> that it would cost
> $25k-$50k to come up with some FEASIBLE initial
> concepts.
> 
>  
> 
> 



		
__________________________________________

i didn't see the condo info..... no to dubai..... do
you really think that the space can be used

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

From: Farkas, Andrew [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com]
Sent: Thursday, January 05, 2006 12:54 PM
To: lesley@nysgllc.com
Subject: Queries

  1.   Are you going to come to Dubai for any of

the time between 1/16 and
1/20? If you do NOT go (i.e. if I do not fly with
you) I will leave Sunday
night, 1/15 and return on the flight leaving Dubai
at 1:30am on 1/20. The
flight to Dubai arrives at 8:30pm on 1/16 and the
return flight lands at JFK
at 6:30am on 1/20. Sultan would like to know so
that appropriate
arrangements may be made.

  1.   Any thoughts about the St. Thomas condo at

Yacht Haven?

  1.   Do you want me to get a space planner

involved in trying to come up
w/ some concepts for a renovation and
reconfiguration of the space on top of
230 Park Avenue for use as your office? My guess is
that it would cost
$25k-$50k to come up with some FEASIBLE initial
concepts.
